voice.tone: Vogue editor × Hermès copywriter × SpaceX mission briefing.

sprint.name: The Sprint
sprint.tagline: Your brand, online at lightning speed.

guarantee: Delivered in 48 hours. 100% satisfaction or you pay nothing. No questions. No conditions.
key_phrases: Not faster because we cut corners. Faster because we removed them.

faq.q: How does the concierge briefing work?
faq.a: You start a conversation on WhatsApp. Three questions. Brand identity, audience, and references. Ten minutes. Your brief is structured and we begin.
Yes. No meetings, no approval chains. We work in focused sprints. The brief gives us everything we need from day one. That is how we deliver at lightning speed.

faq.q: What if I am not satisfied?
faq.a: You pay nothing. The guarantee is unconditional. 100% refund, no questions.

faq.q: What do I need to provide?
faq.a: Ten minutes with your concierge. If you have brand assets — ideal. If not, we advise.
We recommend the right stack for your project. Next.js, Webflow, Shopify, or custom code. We choose what serves the brief.

faq.q: Do I own everything after delivery?
faq.a: Full IP transfer on delivery. Source files, assets, everything — yours completely.

color_philosophy: The canvas is black. The world inside is in full color. Photography is unrestricted — full saturation. Brand frame stays black/cream. Accent colors appear like a single Hermès orange box in a grey room.

photography_rules.saturation: Always full color — never desaturated, never grayscale unless deliberately B&W for purpose
photography_rules.lighting: Single dominant light source per shot
photography_rules.humans: Never — the Knight is the avatar
photography_rules.style: Editorial — each image is a spread, not a thumbnail

design.notes: animation_intensity: none | minimal | full. Section modes are controlled via site.sections_order[].mode.

tokens._note: Design decisions — sync.py writes these as CSS custom properties. Change here → website changes.

hero.label: Digital Atelier · Dubai · NYC · Worldwide
hero.headline: Digital precision. Rapid deployment.
hero.subheadline: We forge premium digital brands. Direct. Decisive. Delivered.

cases.title: Restaurant Flagship
cases.challenge: A private dining experience with no online presence. Reservations by referral only. The site had to feel like the evening itself.
cases.build: Full-bleed chapter-based scroll. No conventional nav. Each section a scene.
cases.result: Reservation requests tripled in the first week. No price listed. No question asked.

cases.title: Studio Website
cases.challenge: Portfolio site for a boutique architecture studio. Work speaks. Site should not interrupt.
cases.build: Grid-based editorial layout. Full-bleed project images. Restraint as design language.
cases.result: Featured in Dezeen. Three new studio commissions within two months.

cases.title: Fragrance Brand
cases.challenge: Launch site for a conceptual fragrance brand. Product does not advertise. It implies.
cases.build: Full-screen product reveal. Single scroll. No price. No cart. Inquiry only.
cases.result: Sold out the first run of 200 units in 72 hours. Stockist in Paris and Dubai.

cases.title: Maison Identity
cases.challenge: A new maison needing digital presence before its first runway. Identity established here first.
cases.build: Editorial lookbook. Collection pages. Press access. No e-commerce — appointment only.
cases.result: Picked up by two buyers at Pitti Uomo. Press credentials issued.

cases.title: Director Portfolio
cases.challenge: Portfolio for a creative director whose work spans fashion, film, and music. Site as gallery.
cases.build: Grid-based archive. Full-screen case studies. Video-first sections.
cases.result: Three new brand partnerships closed within the month. Agency inquiries doubled.

cases.title: Studio Portfolio
cases.challenge: Photography portfolio where the work is the product. Site must not compete with the images.
cases.build: Full-bleed grid. Lightbox reveals. Booking inquiry form. Minimal type.
cases.result: Now fully booked six months in advance. Client list includes two fashion weeks.

process.title: Brief.
process.text: Ten minutes with the concierge agent on WhatsApp. Three questions. Vision, audience, references.

process.title: Build.
process.text: We work in a focused sprint. No check-ins. No approval loops. You brief once. We build to match.

process.title: Ship.
process.text: Delivered at lightning speed. Full IP transfer. Source files, assets — everything is yours.

contact.label: Initiate your vision.
contact.headline: Brief us.
contact.sub: State your mandate. The agent responds within the hour.

work.label: Selected Work
work.headline: The portfolio.
work.nudge: Consider a similar creation for your marque.

about.label: The studio
about.headline: Craft at speed.
about.body: CZR is not an agency. Not a freelancer. We are a focused atelier — three people who build every project personally, at full intensity.

sales.intro_template:
CZR Studio.

Brief me — three questions and I'll quote your project.

What's the name of your brand?

objections.too_expensive: Three agencies would quote 5x and take 6 weeks. We deliver at lightning speed with a money-back guarantee.
objections.need_to_think: Your spot stays open for 24 hours. The link is here when you're ready.
objections.more_examples: Let me pull some relevant work.
objections.how_it_works: Three steps: brief, build, ship. All via WhatsApp.

never_say: let me check with the team
flow: HOOK — Greet. Ask what brings them here. Be curious.
DISCOVER — Understand their business in 2-3 exchanges.
QUALIFY — Collect name and email naturally.

pages_config._note: Declares page collections for the Builder Swarm. Each entry = a set of subpages to generate.
